scripts.build: bun run --filter @inko/shared build && bun run --filter @inko/api build && bun run --filter @inko/web build
scripts.test: bun run --filter @inko/shared test && bun run --filter @inko/api test && bun run --filter @inko/web test
scripts.lint: bun run --filter @inko/shared lint && bun run --filter @inko/api lint && bun run --filter @inko/web lint
